channel.title: Monerica - Newest and Sponsored Listings
channel.description: The latest additions and sponsors in our directory.

item.title: Wallstreet Exchanger
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Bitcoin to Monero exchange. - Location: Moscow - Processor: Bitcart - Contact: TG: @crymxr

item.title: PsychonautWiki
item.description: Non-Profits > Medical : A community-driven online encyclopedia that aims to document the emerging field of psychonautics in a comprehensive, scientifically-grounded manner.

item.title: Erowid
item.description: Non-Profits > Medical : Documenting the Complex Relationship Between Humans and Psychoactives

item.title: CardsRelay
item.description: Cards > Gift Cards : Gift Cards and Mobile Top Ups globally using XMR. Simple, quick, transparent pricing - Location: Charlestown - Processor: NOWPayments - Contact: https://x.com/Cards_Relay

item.title: Willpower Studios
item.description: Media > Music : Transdisciplinary Artist & Performer - Processor: Direct to wallet - Contact: creation[at]willpowerstudios.com

item.title: Backlynk
item.description: Businesses > Digital Goods/ Services : Submit your site to 200+ curated web directories with workflow automation, verification handling, and screenshot proof.

item.title: Coin Moebius
item.description: Merchant Services > Integrations : We help merchants take payments on any website. You add a buy button, we do the hard part behind it, and we never store your customers' info.

item.title: Cypher eSIM
item.description: Businesses > Phone Plans, SMS & SIM Cards : No-KYC travel eSIM for 180+ countries. No account, ID, or email required. Instant QR activation. Available on the web and via Telegram. - Contact: @cypher_esim

item.title: Superswap
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Non-custodial, no-KYC instant swap Specializing in Monero. Fixed-rate, no slippage during the swap. No account required. - Note: Bitcoin → Monero bridge for users exiting KYC exchanges

item.title: ANONPAY
item.description: Merchant Services > Miscellaneous : Crypto payment processor. 60+ supported currencies. no KYC. no JS, 0% fee

item.title: xmr.is
item.description: Web Hosting > VPS & Dedicated Server Providers : Fast VPS in Amsterdam.

item.title: refan toxnode
item.description: Nodes > Public Remote Nodes & Operators : A secure p2p DHT nodes based chat platform, and here is refan's node

item.title: ✅ GhostSwap (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Anonymous Crypto Exchange – No KYC Crypto Swap. 1,600+ supported coins, a fast, private, and hassle-free way to exchange crypto on your own terms. - Contact: https://t.me/GhostSwap1

item.title: Ezmdl
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : An web implementation of yt-dlp. - Processor: NOWPayments

item.title: Tokensfund
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : One intent, three liquidity networks. We quote THORChain, Chainflip and NEAR Intents at once and route your swap to the best price — without ever holding your funds. - Processor: Direct to wallet - Contact: @tokensfund

item.title: Monero leaks
item.description: Media > Miscellaneous : Examples of privacy leaks used to trace Monero

item.title: Valravn Crafts
item.description: Businesses > Tobacco Products & Accessories : Premium Handcrafted Hookahs & Accessories - Contact: we.are@valravn.store

item.title: Manually Audited No-KYC Crypto Directory
item.description: Other Directories > Crypto Exchanges : Manually audited, independently graded reviews of no‑KYC crypto-to-crypto services. I categorize platforms by their operational model and audit each against strict privacy. - Note: Many users have lost funds after trusting the wrong service or falling for scams. I aim to reduce that harm by providing consistent, transparent reviews and fresh verification timestamps so users can make safer choices.

item.title: MSE - Monero Signal Engine
item.description: Finance > Charts & Portfolios : Monero signals with privacy-grade edge. MSE blends EMA structure, long-baseline trend, momentum, RSI, MACD, volatility, drawdown, support/resistance, volume pressure, etc. - Location: North America - Processor: Direct to wallet - Contact: @snifflz_XMR

item.title: nullsink
item.description: Businesses > AI Services : Privacy-first prepaid LLM API proxy. Mint a bearer key in your browser, fund it with Monero sent to a single-use address, and point any Anthropic or OpenAI SDK at the proxy. - Processor: Custom

item.title: hide.cash
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Exchange popular crypto to XMR privately. No KYC, no logs, no account creation. - Processor: Custom

item.title: VoidMob
item.description: Businesses > Phone Plans, SMS & SIM Cards : Real 4G/5G Mobile Proxies, carrier-based SMS verifications, and Global eSIMs unified into privacy-focused, monero-friendly platform. - Processor: Plisio - Contact: Telegram - @voidmobcom, email - info@voidmob.com

item.title: ProxyPagos
item.description: Businesses > Phone Plans, SMS & SIM Cards : Mobile top-ups, prepaid services, international eSIMs, and cardless ATM cash withdrawals for users in Mexico. - Processor: Custom - Contact: @proxypagos

item.title: betKarma
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : A crypto platform for BTC/XMR swaps, crypto asset exchange, and provably fair casino games, with casino balances denominated in satoshis. - Location: Willemstad - Processor: Coin Payments

item.title: CaptainMorganObmen
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Cryptocurrency exchange without KYC/AML - Contact: https://t.me/CaptainMorganObmen

item.title: ✅ SolvoCard.com (sponsored)
item.description:
Cards > Prepaid Cards : Get a No-KYC debit card (EURO & USD) in seconds with just your email. Works worldwide with Apple Pay, Google Pay, and 3D Secure.
Now featuring eSIMs for 150+ countries. - Note: MasterCard currency is EURO. Visa is USD country code (Visa): US. Apple Pay works only with Visa. - Processor: Heleket - Contact: @solvocard on X/Twitter and Telegram

item.title: WormGPT
item.description: Businesses > AI Services : Unrestricted AI. No filters, no limits, no boundaries. Advanced code generation, security research, and unrestricted content creation. - Processor: NOWPayments

item.title: Hack Forums
item.description: Businesses > Marketing : A long-standing online community dedicated to the discussion, education, and advancement of technology, cybersecurity, programming, privacy, digital culture, and entrepreneurs

item.title: ❌ VelshoCards
item.description: Cards > Prepaid Cards : It helps you turn crypto into spendable virtual cards for online payments, subscriptions, travel bookings, SaaS tools, and global checkout. No Waiting, No KYC - Note: misleading stats and scam accusation - Processor: NOWPayments - Contact: https://t.me/velshocards

item.title: Osintcabal
item.description: Non-Profits > Knowledge : We are a loose collective of both casual and licensed investigators providing resources for those who share our passion for OSINT.

item.title: ZanoX
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Non-custodial instant crypto swaps with no traditional KYC and no signup — swap the privacy coin Zano (ZANO) and other assets directly from your own wallet. - Note: Sells gift cards, too.

item.title: Quinn’s Space
item.description: Businesses > Digital Goods/ Services : Digital accounts

item.title: Dex.CR
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Instant privacy-oriented XMR exchange. Own liquidity pools, no 3rd parties.

item.title: ❓ mone.so
item.description: Exchanges > Peer-to-Peer Exchanges : Peer to peer market - Note: Claims to be from 2025

item.title: MoneroSwap.net
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Non-custodial interface to swap in and out of Monero. No account, no KYC, no logs — funds are never held. Open-source frontend with a published canary and TOR service. - Contact: support@moneroswap.net

item.title: ❓ Nitro Eggs
item.description: Businesses > Miscellaneous : A working free-range egg farm in Serbia. Open an account, back hens with Monero (XMR), watch the flock on a live 24/7 camera, and receive your share of egg-sale revenue. - Note: unclear if it's economically viable

item.title: bespale
item.description: VPNs > Global / Unspecified : No-logs doubleVPN, de-Googled secure smartphone, bootable encrypted privacy-OS SSD, personals messengers and private email. No account required to order. - Processor: Custom - Contact: matrix - @sup:bes.spa

item.title: ❓ Priamex
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Privacy-focused crypto exchange offering fast, secure, and confidential swaps with no unnecessary collection of personal data. - Note: reviews and rating shown on page do not match or link to actual TrustPilot page - Contact: https://t.me/Priamex_support

item.title: Bitania - P2P
item.description: Exchanges > Peer-to-Peer Exchanges : Trade globally with complete privacy. No KYC. No limits. No surveillance.

item.title: Bitania - Swap
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Account-less, non-custodial. Swap crypto in minutes.

item.title: Bitania - CEX (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Centralized Exchanges : A fast, low-fee cryptocurrency CEX service. Trade XMR, BTC, LTC, USDT, TRX on live books. - Processor: Custom - Contact: t.me/BitaniaNews

item.title: ❌ 0xSwap
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : No KYC. No registration. No IP logs. Swap Monero, Bitcoin, and 100+ assets — better rates, faster fills, zero trail. You trade. - Note: engaged in XSS attack to change listing status - Contact: @oxswapsupport

item.title: ✅ XMR.WIN
item.description: Businesses > Gambling : Monero Prediction Market - Zero KYC - Deposit any crypto - API/MCP for agents - Processor: Custom - Contact: support@xmr.win

item.title: ❓ Pryvero.net
item.description: Cards > Prepaid Cards : Spend Your Crypto. Privately. Effortlessly. Fund your account with 100+ cryptocurrencies. Get a virtual card instantly. Pay anywhere—online or in-store. - Note: Connection to scam site nokyc.cards - Processor: Cryptomus - Contact: https://t.me/pryvero

item.title: IronSwaps
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : No-KYC instant crypto swap service. No registration, no email required. Supports XMR as both input and output. High AML mode available which routes output directly to XMR. - Contact: t.me/jolyIrony on telegram

item.title: n.exchange
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Swap your crypto instantly with an average delivery time of 5 minutes.

item.title: ✅ xChange.me (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : No kyc instant exchange since 2017. Tor mirror, CLI client, fully anonymous, private and safe. - Contact: @xchange_me_

item.title: Skylight Wallet (Desktop)
item.description: Wallets > Desktop Wallets : A modern, open-source, and self-custody Monero light-wallet.

item.title: Plaintext
item.description: Education > Knowledge : A podcast that covers interesting security and privacy related topics in the cryptocurrency ecosystem, especially for Monero.

item.title: ❓ Fastexer
item.description: Exchanges > Miscellaneous : Exchange using various payment methods. - Note: Reports of bad exchange rates

item.title: Crow
item.description: Onion Only > Miscellaneous : Encrypted messages on Tor - Processor: Direct to wallet

item.title: Privacy Academy
item.description: Businesses > Courses : Join the only community designed to help overwhelmed, non-techy people learn how to get private and secure online. - Processor: Over Email

item.title: uSwap
item.description:
Exchanges > Aggregators : Offers XMR to anything without KYC. Literally anything.
CashApp/other fiats, 100+ Cryptos, Discord Products, Telegram Products, Mullvad B4U & more being added daily. - Processor: Custom - Contact: t.me/maintenance

item.title: ✅ Trocador (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : A privacy-focused exchange aggregator with minimal JavaScript. - Contact: https://t.me/TrocadorSupportBot

item.title: ❓ ServerExpress
item.description: Web Hosting > VPS & Dedicated Server Providers : Dedicated & VPS Servers in Stockholm, Sweden and London, UK - Note: Non functional control panel. - Processor: Custom

item.title: Pep Labs Research
item.description: Businesses > Medical/ Pharmaceutical Treatments : Pharmaceutical-grade research peptides and pharma compounds for Australian buyers. Independent Janoshik COAs at 99 percent plus purity. Crypto-only, no account required. - Note: Australia-only shipping via Australia Post Express. Customer name and address are encrypted client-side under a customer-chosen PIN; the server only stores ciphertext. Order tracking via PIN-protected page or optional Telegram bot. - Location: Melbourne, Victoria - Processor: Direct to wallet - Contact: peplabsresearch@gmail.com

item.title: Key2.com
item.description: Freelancers > Designers : A bespoke freelancing service providing a range of digital solutions—from SEO, AEO, and website design, to social media management, graphic design. - Contact: https://www.instagram.com/key2.com_uk/

item.title: ✅ ArkonSwap
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Cross-chain crypto swaps with genuine privacy. No KYC, no registration. Swap BTC, ETH, SOL, XMR and more. Non-custodial. - Note: Fee service : 0.5% - Contact: @ArkonSwap

item.title: Phantom AI
item.description: Businesses > AI Services : OpenAI-compatible API proxy for AI inference. No accounts, no email, no logs. - Note: Source code release planned. PGP key at /pgp.txt. - Processor: Direct to wallet - Contact: 09654A79076956E6042D11946296DEC4E954FC76 PGP

item.title: nodo austral
item.description: Businesses > IT Services : Industrial monitoring and control. Dashboards with data from systems and equipment, automatic alerts when something goes out of range, and remote control from anywhere. - Note: Spanish language - Location: Balcarce – Mar del Plata - Processor: Trocador

item.title: Label Drop
item.description: Businesses > Postage & Shipping Services : No KYC fill in your shipment details, and receive your approved prepaid shipping label with all duties paid. End to end labels are issued through active business accounts. - Processor: NOWPayments - Contact: https://t.me/droplabel#

item.title: CypherGoat SimpleX Chat Bot
item.description: Exchanges > Bots : Non-custodial crypto swap aggregator via SimpleX Chat. Swap BTC, XMR, ETH and many more across 20+ exchange partners with no account, no KYC, and no IP logging. Monero-first.

item.title: XMR Plinko
item.description: Businesses > Gambling : No KYC. No bullshit. No accounts. Drop the ball, win Monero. Provably fair Plinko you can verify yourself, so bring your own wallet and send it. - Processor: Direct to wallet - Contact: info@xmrplinko.com

item.title: ❓ Mistex
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Privacy-first cryptocurrency exchange Without Limits. No KYC. No logs. No signup process. 400+ XMR Pairs with Instant Processing. Trade using Telegram Bot - @mistex_bot 1-2% FEE / 24/7 - Note: misrepresented swap totals on site, may use CEX for some routes, lied to users - Contact: https://mistex.io/contact

item.title: ❓ Expeer
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Fast, secure, and fully automated crypto-to-crypto exchange. No registration required. Non-custodial instant swaps with competitive rates. - Note: Emails aren’t sending - Contact: @Ex_peer

item.title: xmr.club
item.description: Other Directories > Business Directories : No-KYC services for the Monero economy

item.title: IR Eyewear
item.description: Businesses > Clothing, Apparel & Accessories : Makes infrared-blocking glasses for people who take their privacy seriously. - Processor: Direct To Wallet - Contact: shop@ireyewear.com Signal: @IReyewear.01

item.title: ✅ Coincards (sponsored)
item.description: Cards > Gift & Prepaid Cards : Gift cards from hundreds of top brands, including Amazon, Walmart, Airbnb, Uber, DoorDash, Home Depot, and even Visa or Amex cards, with values up to $2,000. - Location: Surrey, B.C. - Processor: BTCPay Server

item.title: ❓ GhostSwap.app
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : A privacy-focused crypto swap platform built to simplify cross-chain asset exchange - Note: Possible attempt at impersonation of existing GhostSwap service. Listed "partners" have no association with project, highly suspicious. - Location: Berlin - Processor: Custom - Contact: techaddict0x

item.title: Ping192
item.description: Businesses > IT Services : Delivers elite red teaming, adversary emulation, and penetration testing services. Authorized offensive security for organizations that have more complex requests. - Location: New York

item.title: Monero Space - Blockchain Explorer
item.description: Utilities > Blockchain Explorers : A fork of mempool.space retargeted to Monero. It surfaces what the chain alone proves — height, hashrate, mempool, fee tiers, ring information, RingCT type — and stops there.

item.title: Skytelecom.io
item.description: Businesses > Phone Plans, SMS & SIM Cards : SMS and VoIP infrastructure for global teams. Allow customers to make international calls and send global sms freely with no restrictions. - Processor: Custom - Contact: @skytelecom_io on telegram

item.title: ✅ Malad Valley Marathon
item.description: Businesses > Fitness : The first marathon to accept XMR directly for entry fees. Run through the scenic and historic Malad Valley. Established in 1884, it is one of Idaho's oldest towns. - Note: race on September 12, 2026, sponsored by Monerica - Location: Malad City, Idaho - Processor: Monero Gateway

item.title: KycNotList
item.description: Other Directories > Crypto Exchanges : A No KYC / No AML crypto exchanger and mixer monitor for users who value privacy, transparency, and safer swaps. - Contact: kycnotlist@proton.me

item.title: XMRMatters
item.description: Exchanges > Peer-to-Peer Exchanges : A privacy-first, desktop-optimized P2P exchange built from scratch to restore surveillance-free Monero trading with zero KYC and hardened escrow. - Note: Stagenet until 19th of June. Preparing for the Mainnet - Location: Worldwide - Processor: Custom - Contact: @XMRMatters

item.title: ❓ Hire a Hacker Pro
item.description: Businesses > IT Services : Providing professional services since 2008 such as asset recovery, offensive tactical cybersecurity, mobile data extraction and more. - Note: claims to be from 2008, but domain register in 2019 - Location: Phoenix, AZ - Contact: @tonycapo Telegram

item.title: ❌ Btc Bullions
item.description: Businesses > Precious Metals : Marketplace for buying certified physical precious metals — shipped discreetly to your door worldwide. - Note: Falsified registration date and uses fake Trustpilot reviews on their site to seem credible. - Processor: BTCPay Server

item.title: Daylight Freedom
item.description: Non-Profits > Media : We expose the technocracy taking your money, your health, your speech, and your privacy.

item.title: ipay24
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : We make cryptocurrency exchanges simple and straightforward, minimizing the number of steps so you can receive your funds quickly and conveniently. - Contact: t.me/ipay24ex

item.title: Accrescent
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : A novel Android app store focused on security, privacy, and usability. - Processor: Direct to wallet

item.title: Monero Order Book
item.description: Exchanges > Miscellaneous : BTC/ XMR order book for decentralized exchanges

item.title: ❓ Jink Host
item.description: Web Hosting > VPS & Dedicated Server Providers : High-performance Proxmox VPS hosting, dedicated servers & cloud storage with AMD Ryzen, EPYC & Intel Xeon hardware in USA & Europe. Budget VPS from $0.99/mo. - Note: Appears to be using nulled/pirated WHMCS which may not be secure or up to date. Doesn’t correspond using official domain. - Processor: Heleket - Contact: admin@jink.host | @JinkHost_Admin Telegram | @Jink Discord

item.title: ✅ SageSwap (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Never KYC, No AML, No Login, and No JavaScript. Fast and private swap service. - Note: 1-2% FEE | 24/7 - Contact: https://SageSwap.io/Support

item.title: Opt Out
item.description: Non-Profits > Media : Privacy focused podcast

item.title: monero.you
item.description: Communities > Forums : A Lemmy instance for Monero community - Contact: admin@monero.you

item.title: Crypto Agorism
item.description: Media > Miscellaneous : Free markets for a free world - Processor: Direct to wallet

item.title: ❌ Red Mercury Vault
item.description: Businesses > Miscellaneous : A premier, research-driven materials enterprise operating at the forefront of advanced energy substrates and high-density catalytic compounds within the Industrial Sector. - Note: Red mercury is a discredited substance, most likely a hoax perpetrated by con artists who sought to take advantage of gullible buyers on the black market for arms.

item.title: PikaSim
item.description: Businesses > Phone Plans, SMS & SIM Cards : Travel eSIMs for 190+ countries. No account, email, name, address, or ID required. Web-based with mobile apps for iOS and Android. Anonymous top-ups via ICCID or order number. - Note: Monero accepted natively (not converted). - Location: Denver, CO - Processor: BTCPay Server - Contact: @PikaSim_esim

item.title: Fsky
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : Instances of frontend services

item.title: sshwap
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Exchange crypto from your terminal - Note: uses ChangeNow API

item.title: Roboex
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : A cryptocurrency exchange service that provides users with access to the latest digital asset exchange options on favorable terms. - Note: Backup domain: roboex.cx - Processor: Custom - Contact: work@roboex.cc

item.title: Stock Enthusiasts
item.description: Businesses > Membership : Group buy: access to top paid investing groups & newsletters for a fraction of the original price - Location: Berlin - Processor: Monero Gateway - Contact: https://t.me/dedmoroz911

item.title: Cloudzy
item.description: Web Hosting > VPS & Dedicated Server Providers : AI-ready cloud servers on the latest AMD EPYC and pure NVMe. - Processor: Cryptomus

item.title: ✅ Silent Exchange (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Fast & Anonymous Crypto to Crypto Swaps. No email. No KYC.Trade-in Minutes. 1500+ Crypto Pairs 24/7/365 Service Fee starting from 1%. - Note: Trade using Telegram Bot - @silentexchangerobot - Contact: Telegram: @silentexchange Email: silentexchange@protonmail.com

item.title: Monero Stats
item.description: Media > Miscellaneous : An aggregate of payment usage data released by businesses that accept Monero.

item.title: MoneroWire
item.description: Media > News (English) : Financial privacy news for people who think it matters.

item.title: Privata
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : Exchange crypto across 50+ providers. Sort by KYC, rate, speed, or fee, and pick what matters to you.

item.title: The Rage
item.description: Non-Profits > Media : An independent publication covering financial surveillance. Privacy is not a crime.

item.title: Disroot
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : A platform providing online services based on principles of freedom, privacy, federation and decentralization. Email and file storage.

item.title: Monero Deutschsprachig
item.description: Communities > SimpleX : Monero German-Speaking SimpleX group

item.title: ❓ Miradex
item.description: Exchanges > Decentralized Exchanges : Swap Across 50+ blockchains via Atomic Swap, THORChain, Chainflip, and Near-Intents all without KYC - Note: User reported slow protocol with refund due to beta bug, or possibly only being refunded due to escalation. - Contact: https://t.me/superuser

item.title: crocuda_vps
item.description: Web Hosting > VPS & Dedicated Server Providers : A VPS provider accessible from your terminal. No registration form. You only need a key. -> `ssh crocuda.com`

item.title: Escrow0
item.description: Exchanges > Peer-to-Peer Exchanges : Protects buyers and sellers with a simple flow: lock funds, verify delivery, then release securely. - Contact: https://X.com/trinaldao

item.title: KingSMTP.com
item.description: Businesses > Digital Goods/ Services : Fast, private, and reliable SMTP for businesses. No KYC required. Up and running in 2 minutes.

item.title: ❌ EasyCCV
item.description: Cards > Prepaid Cards : No KYC Virtual prepaid Mastercard Card. Apple Pay supported. - Note: report of scam and bad card number - Processor: Custom

item.title: ✅ 0trace
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Instant private cryptocurrency exchange service. Built for fast cross-network exchange with no logs and tracking. - Processor: Custom

item.title: WTF is XMR?
item.description: Education > Guides : Complete Monero Privacy Guide

item.title: LibreGuide
item.description: Non-Profits > Media : The guide to independent news. - Processor: MoneroPay

item.title: ✅ CypherGoat (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : Non-custodial swap aggregator for private crypto exchanges. Find the best rate across trusted providers and swap instantly. - Location: Sweden

item.title: ✅ Wagyu.xyz (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Seamlessly bridge assets between Monero and Hyperliquid with Wagyu. Private Cross-Chain Bridge. The first decentralized orderbook exchange supporting native XMR deposits. - Note: US & UAE citizens are not welcome in using any Wagyu products. - Contact: https://t.me/PerpetualCow

item.title: ✅ MoneroDice (sponsored)
item.description: Businesses > Gambling : Simple, fast, privacy-respecting dice and blackjack game. Provably fair mode for dice is available too. - Contact: contact [at] monerodice.pro

item.title: ✅ Cake Wallet (sponsored)
item.description: Wallets > Mobile Wallets : Allows you to safely store, send, receive, and exchange your XMR, BTC, and LTC (and exchange other currencies)

item.title: ✅ CCE Cash (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : This is a fully automated service that allows you to quickly exchange various cryptocurrencies such as XMR, BTC, ETH, and SOL without requiring identity verification. - Contact: https://x.com/Cce_Cash
